name: The Perfect Garden
short_description: Create the perfect garden: plant vegetables and berries, clean up after guests, collect bouquets, and design flower beds — all for the sake of comfort and pleasure. Simple controls, deep customization, and pleasant graphics.
detailed_description:
Have you ever wondered how to make your own dream garden?

Try this simulation-casual game of The Perfect Garden , which gives you the opportunity to feel on your own skin what it's like to plant strawberries or clean up after you've had guests. Your mission is to do all the garden work on time and very good!

Game Features :
- Possibility to design the garden according to your own preferences
- Planting different vegetables that bear fruit
- Bouquet assembly
